free_text: Neutron yields from 435 MeV/nucleon Nb stopping in Nb
and 272 MeV/nucleon Nb stopping in Nb and Al
followed by NE102 (6.4 mm thick) veto detectors
Flight path of 840 cm (3 to 40 deg),
- detector efficiency calculated by Cecil's code
- neutron loss by materials between target and detector
- background (could not be measured due to time limit)
No information on the source of uncertainty
No information on the source of uncertainty
